default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Rapyd's content strategy for optimizing visibility in AI-powered search (GEO/AEO) and explore content repurposing opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GEO/AEO strategy focuses on high-intent searches, monitoring LLM referrals, and tracking \~200 specific prompts](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [SEO remains crucial as a foundation for LLM visibility; competitor comparisons and recent content perform well](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Content repurposing (e.g., videos, podcasts) and distribution on platforms like Reddit can expand Rapyd's digital footprint](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Incorporating social proof and customer use cases in content is highly effective for engagement and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)

## Topics

### GEO/AEO Strategy and Monitoring

  - [Focus on high-intent product evaluation searches most likely to lead to referrals](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Using GA4 to track LLM referrals and Scrunch to monitor \~200 specific prompts](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Visibility in AI Answers is finicky; same prompt can yield different results for different users](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [SEO remains crucial for being the "most popular answer" in probabilistic LLM responses](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)

### Effective Content Types for LLM Visibility

  - [Competitor comparisons perform well (e.g., "Rapyd vs. Stripe")](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [Content should be structured for easy LLM crawling, practically useful, clear, and tactical](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=849.0)
  - [Recent content and presence in community forums (e.g., Reddit) boost LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [High-opportunity industry content works well on Reddit, addressing common pain points](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)

### Content Repurposing and Distribution

  - [Explore turning blog posts into videos using tools like Notebook LM](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1206.0)
  - [Consider creating podcasts from blog content, interlinking between blog, podcast, and video](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Repurpose content for newsletters, focusing on trends, comparisons, and opinionated pieces](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Utilize tools like Hunch.tools for creating modular content blocks for various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1309.0)

### Social Media and Sales Team Content

  - [Case studies and use cases perform best on social media and generate leads](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Implement a "case study, use case" alternating pattern for social media posts](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Leverage Octopost for creating content pillars for the sales team](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Focus on social proof and pain point content for better sales team engagement](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1838.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Flag content suitable for Reddit and other forums](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
  - [Identify blogs that are good candidates for video/podcast conversion via Notebook LM](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Expand country guides into comprehensive resources (blog posts, videos, podcasts, regional e-books)](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
  - [Create more comparison blogs for use on Reddit and other platforms](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Add Ari (social media person) to Airtable and Slack for content distribution](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)
  - [Mara to explore potential Reddit workstream development](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1706.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up discussion on social media strategies with Nicolette and Ari](https://fathom.video/share/i6VzJ7u-Dj7f6xLW_V4-7zy-MypYSFsv?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)

Flag blogs good for Notebook.LM video/podcast conversion in Airtable
Add Ari to Rapyd Airtable/Slack channels
